items.claim: Farid Basharat's opponent is not UFC caliber and lacks diverse skills beyond basic boxing.
items.quote: He got a short notice guy who is not UFC caliber, his opponent is a good boxer. And that's where it ends. You're not going to see him wrestle. You're not going to see him have diverse striking.

items.claim: Farid Basharat's opponent has poor cardio and tends to slow down in fights.
items.quote: And he's not very fast. And he actually tends to slow down.

items.claim: Robert Whittaker is faster, more technical, and more experienced than Nikita Krylov.
items.quote: Robert should be faster, more technical. He definitely has more experience.

items.claim: Nikita Krylov has a weak chin and is prone to being finished.
items.quote: Nikita Kryov is a little chinny. He's a bit finishable.

items.claim: Conor McGregor lacks the cardio to compete in a high-paced fight.
items.quote: Conor McGregor has never had cardio ever.
Max Holloway, even though he got knocked out by Ilia Taporia, is insanely durable.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's physical condition has declined due to age, inactivity, and injury.
items.quote: Conor McGregor is 38 years old. Coming back after five years, coming back after rehab, coming back after a horrific injury.

items.claim: Caesar Almeida is a higher-level striker than his opponent.
items.quote: I think this is a mostly striking matchup and I think Caesar is the better striker.

items.claim: Caesar Almeida is 38 years old, which is a significant disadvantage against his younger opponent.
items.quote: Caesar Almeida is pretty old. He's 38 years old. He's fighting a young guy, 14 years younger than him.
